name: Terrific Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb beef chuck - cut into 1-inch cubes
4 medium carrots - cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Coat the meat in the seasoned flour mixture and brown it in hot oil in an oven-safe dish.
3. Add the condensed tomato soup, water, chopped onion, and dried basil to the dish.
4. Cover and bake at 375°F for 1 hour.
5. Add the vegetables (potatoes and carrots) and wine.
6. Continue cooking, covered, for another hour or until the meat is tender.
7. The vegetables should be soft when pierced with a fork.
8. Serve over noodles or rice. Serves 4.
